evidenceContract.userBehavior: Read the selected fixture material, produce a named Markdown analysis, and inspect the automatic Workspace Board creative-content graph.

observables.description: Selected source evidence, named Markdown artifact, delivery ledger receipt, top-level content node identities, creative relation identity, and no-fallback facts.

evidenceContract.expectedResult: The selected material and named Markdown analysis appear as deduplicated top-level Workspace Board nodes connected by one creative dependency; unselected material, visual processing Groups, and generic handoff paths are absent.
evidenceContract.expectedFailure: Missing source evidence, unnamed/final-answer-only Markdown, omitted analysis, active-target routing, duplicate delivery, or missing receipt fails.

steps.prompt: Read only screenplay.fountain from the fixture workspace and produce a named, reviewable Markdown artifact titled Material Analysis with the selected scene's findings. Do not treat plan.md or station-illustration.svg as used material.
